de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor

Class InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor

  • java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY

        public static final Properties.Property<ImmutableList<Term>> INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY
        Strategy property which saves the list of formulas which where added by information flow contract applications. This list is used by the macros UseInformationFlowContractMacro and PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro to decide how to prepare the formulas resulting from information flow contract applications.

    • Constructor Detail

      • InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor

        public InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor(InfFlowContractAppTaclet taclet)

    • Method Detail

      • addToAntec

        protected void addToAntec(Semisequent semi,
              TermLabelState termLabelState,
              Taclet.TacletLabelHint labelHint,
              SequentChangeInfo currentSequent,
              PosInOccurrence pos,
              PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence,
              MatchConditions matchCond,
              Goal goal,
              RuleApp tacletApp,
              Services services)
        Description copied from class: TacletExecutor
        adds SequentFormula to antecedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the antecedent). Of course it has to be ensured that the position information describes one occurrence in the antecedent of the sequent.
        Overrides:
        addToAntec in class TacletExecutor<InfFlowContractAppTaclet>
        Parameters:
        semi - the Semisequent with the the ConstrainedFormulae to be added
        termLabelState - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        labelHint - The hint used to maintain TermLabels.
        currentSequent - the Sequent which is the current (intermediate) result of applying the taclet
        pos - the PosInOccurrence describing the place in the sequent or null for head of antecedent
        applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence of the Term which is rewritten
        matchCond - the MatchConditions containing in particular the instantiations of the schemavariables
        services - the Services encapsulating all java information

      • updateStrategyInfo

        private void updateStrategyInfo(Goal goal,
                      Term applFormula)
        Add the contract application formula to the list of the INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY.
        Parameters:
        goal - the current goal
        applFormula - the information contract application formula added by this taclet
